value_i18n.ar_SA:
This campaign in a box is designed for Liferay partners to use in their lead generation efforts and contains ready-to-use marketing assets for a vertical solution-focused approach for Liferay’s Financial Services Client Portal.

By using Liferay to build your client portal, you will be able to: 

  • Empower clients with intuitive self-service for everyday tasks and offer more advanced services to differentiate yourself from competitors.
  • Allow business users to quickly launch new campaigns using low-code tools and update the portal based on analytics data.
  • Integrate and orchestrate systems and channels to provide a unified client experience while preserving investments in existing technologies.
